paper.title: BigFinanceBench: A Workflow-Grounded Benchmark for Financial-Research Agents

official_code_release.relationship_to_paper: The pinned commit is dated approximately 22 hours after arXiv v1 submission. Its commit message adds the published arXiv citation, and its README says the harness reproduces the companion paper, but timing alone does not establish byte identity with the manuscript-time implementation.

official_dataset_release.integrity_check: All 34 pinned-revision files were size-verified against the Hugging Face tree API and the assembled ZIP passed an integrity test
official_dataset_release.relationship_to_code_release: The Hugging Face public subset is byte-identical to the JSONL bundled in the pinned GitHub archive. The dataset revision additionally preserves 10 public-subset trace files and 20 judge-grade files; it does not expose the held-back 878 items or full-benchmark headline outputs.

acquisition_scope: The immutable arXiv v1 PDF was downloaded and converted to layout-preserving full text. The title/byline, arXiv marker, methods and authoring appendix, results table, example trajectory, dataset statistics, and final page were inspected to verify coherent extraction through page 25. The official GitHub archive was pinned, downloaded, ZIP-tested, and inventoried. The officially linked Hugging Face dataset revision was pinned; all 34 files, including 256.5 MB of public-subset traces and grades, were downloaded, size-checked, assembled into a local ZIP, and inspected for row and identifier coverage. This is source acquisition and extraction, not a deep review, execution of the release, validation of the graders, or endorsement of workflow, professional-validity, representativeness, capability, or readiness claims.
review_handoff: The full review should investigate why two trace files and three grade files contain 151 rows rather than the nominal 50 questions x 3 trials, and whether duplicate/resumption semantics affect released-subset metrics. It should also preserve the distinction between the 50-item, outcome-stratified public subset with released traces/grades and the held-back 878-item full evaluation whose tasks and outputs are not publicly inspectable.
local_storage_note: The PDF and both release ZIPs are intentionally ignored local evidence; the extracted paper text, paper index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable URLs/revisions above and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
